TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O Collage hananay i, o tatosaay a romadiway a cefang i Taywan, Nani 2019 a mihecaan 1 folad 31 romi'ad a misatapang. Ira sa ci Natsuko Lariyod aci Ông Ka-koân itira i Collage. O niharatengan no ngangan nomira i, nani cecayay a nakamayan o "Collage" hananay ko ngangan nomira i sowal no Française. O kasateked nomira i, ira ko masamaamaanay a laleko no radiw nomira. O roma sato i, miala komira to kasasiromaromaay a sowal a misanga' to radiw, ira ko sanoHolam, sanoTaywan, sanoAmirika, sanoRipon, sanoAmis/Pangcah, ato romaroma, misaloma' to faelohay to nanitirengay a niharatengan nomira. Namalaheci komira to kaolahan no Saka33 a Faelohay no Ekimay a Radiway , napasasowal ci Natsuko a mala to kaolahan, "Nanay o sakapafelien no radiw nomira to sa'icel ko kasasiromaay a tamdaw, sowal, gender, ato radiw" sowal sa ci Natsuko. O nikaharateng no Collage a misaradiw i, pakarakarakat no tireng a sasowal to kimad no romaroma a nalimawan, nikaorira i, caayay pidoedo kamo to niharateng no sera no Taywan, nanay ira ho ko ngala' a pasacefang to imi no raradiwan. O "haliCollage" hananay ko cimil no maolahay no Collage. O Histori (Kongko) I 2018 a mihecaan, namidemak ciira to "Seikai Sakacecay - Ma'orip to fa'elohay a Shiken" no Band no 'Adingo ato The Bell. I 2019 a mihecaan, o ngangan no tatosa a romadiway ci "Collage" ciira a misatapang i Soni no Lalan (StreetVoice) ato Lalan no Simal (Youtube) I 2019 a mihecaan, saka3 a folad ira ko saka27 a romi'ad, misatapang a misanga' to radiw i "N1 Party - O Raradiw no Tamdaw no Nanguaq" ko Nanguaq, Payleday Records... O Romadiway O Radiw (Songs/Raradiw) O Albums (Taradiwan) O Singles (Radiw) O Awards ato Accolades O References O Links StreetVoice Spotify O Channel no Collage O Facebook Page no Collage O Instagram no Natsuko Lariyod O Instagram no Ông Ka-koân
S.PHON: o~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə ħananaj i, o~u tato~usaaj a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj a ʦəfaŋ i tajwan, nani **** a miħəʦaan * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a misatapaŋ. ira sa ʦi natso~u~uko~u ɾarijo~uɬ~ɮ aʦi *ŋ ka-ko~u*n itira i ʦo~uɾɾa*ə. o~u niħaratəŋan no~u ŋaŋan no~umira i, nani ʦəʦajaj a nakamajan o~u "ʦo~uɾɾa*ə" ħananaj ko~u ŋaŋan no~umira i so~uwaɾ no~u fran*aisə. o~u kasatəkəɬ~ɮ no~umira i, ira ko~u masamaamaanaj a ɾaɾəko~u no~u raɬ~ɮiw no~umira. o~u ro~uma sato~u i, miaɾa ko~umira to~u kasasiro~umaro~umaaj a so~uwaɾ a misaŋaʡ to~u raɬ~ɮiw, ira ko~u sano~uħo~uɾam, sano~utajwan, sano~uamirika, sano~uripo~un, sano~uamis/paŋʦaħ, ato~u ro~umaro~uma, misaɾo~umaʡ to~u faəɾo~uħaj to~u nanitirəŋaj a niħaratəŋan no~umira. namaɾaħəʦi ko~umira to~u kao~uɾaħan no~u saka** a faəɾo~uħaj no~u əkimaj a raɬ~ɮiwaj , napasaso~uwaɾ ʦi natso~u~uko~u a maɾa to~u kao~uɾaħan, "nanaj o~u sakapafəɾiən no~u raɬ~ɮiw no~umira to~u saʡiʦəɾ ko~u kasasiro~umaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, so~uwaɾ, *ənɬ~ɮər, ato~u raɬ~ɮiw" so~uwaɾ sa ʦi natso~u~uko~u. o~u nikaħaratəŋ no~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə a misaraɬ~ɮiw i, pakarakarakat no~u tirəŋ a saso~uwaɾ to~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u ro~umaro~uma a naɾimawan, nikao~urira i, ʦaajaj piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u kamo~u to~u niħaratəŋ no~u səra no~u tajwan, nanaj ira ħo~u ko~u ŋaɾaʡ a pasaʦəfaŋ to~u imi no~u raraɬ~ɮiwan. o~u "ħaɾiʦo~uɾɾa*ə" ħananaj ko~u ʦimiɾ no~u mao~uɾaħaj no~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə. o~u ħisto~uri (ko~uŋko~u) i **** a miħəʦaan, namiɬ~ɮəmak ʦiira to~u "səikai sakaʦəʦaj - maʡo~urip to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a sħikən" no~u b~b~vanɬ~ɮ no~u ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u ato~u tħə b~b~vəɾɾ. i **** a miħəʦaan, o~u ŋaŋan no~u tato~usa a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj ʦi "ʦo~uɾɾa*ə" ʦiira a misatapaŋ i so~uni no~u ɾaɾan (strəətb~vo~uiʦə) ato~u ɾaɾan no~u simaɾ (jo~uo~u~uto~u~ub~b~və) i **** a miħəʦaan, saka* a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u saka** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, misatapaŋ a misaŋaʡ to~u raɬ~ɮiw i "n* partj - o~u raraɬ~ɮiw no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u naŋo~u~ua*" ko~u naŋo~u~ua*, pajɾəɬ~ɮaj rəʦo~urɬ~ɮs... o~u ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj o~u raɬ~ɮiw (so~uŋs/raraɬ~ɮiw) o~u aɾb~b~vo~u~ums (taraɬ~ɮiwan) o~u siŋɾəs (raɬ~ɮiw) o~u awarɬ~ɮs ato~u aʦʦo~uɾaɬ~ɮəs o~u rəfərənʦəs o~u ɾinks strəətb~vo~uiʦə spo~utifj o~u ʦħannəɾ no~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə o~u faʦəb~b~vo~uo~uk pa*ə no~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə o~u insta*ram no~u natso~u~uko~u ɾarijo~uɬ~ɮ o~u insta*ram no~u *ŋ ka-ko~u*n
S.FORM: O Collage hananay i, o tatosaay a romadiway a cefang i Taywan, Nani 2019 a mihecaan 1 folad 31 romi'ad a misatapang. Ira sa ci Natsuko Lariyod aci Ông Ka-koân itira i Collage. O niharatengan no ngangan nomira i, nani cecayay a nakamayan o "Collage" hananay ko ngangan nomira i sowal no Française. O kasateked nomira i, ira ko masamaamaanay a laleko no radiw nomira. O roma sato i, miala komira to kasasiromaromaay a sowal a misanga' to radiw, ira ko sanoHolam, sanoTaywan, sanoAmirika, sanoRipon, sanoAmis/Pangcah, ato romaroma, misaloma' to faelohay to nanitirengay a niharatengan nomira. Namalaheci komira to kaolahan no Saka33 a Faelohay no Ekimay a Radiway , napasasowal ci Natsuko a mala to kaolahan, "Nanay o sakapafelien no radiw nomira to sa'icel ko kasasiromaay a tamdaw, sowal, gender, ato radiw" sowal sa ci Natsuko. O nikaharateng no Collage a misaradiw i, pakarakarakat no tireng a sasowal to kimad no romaroma a nalimawan, nikaorira i, caayay pidoedo kamo to niharateng no sera no Taywan, nanay ira ho ko ngala' a pasacefang to imi no raradiwan. O "haliCollage" hananay ko cimil no maolahay no Collage. O Histori (Kongko) I 2018 a mihecaan, namidemak ciira to "Seikai Sakacecay - Ma'orip to fa'elohay a Shiken" no Band no 'Adingo ato The Bell. I 2019 a mihecaan, o ngangan no tatosa a romadiway ci "Collage" ciira a misatapang i Soni no Lalan (StreetVoice) ato Lalan no Simal (Youtube) I 2019 a mihecaan, saka3 a folad ira ko saka27 a romi'ad, misatapang a misanga' to radiw i "N1 Party - O Raradiw no Tamdaw no Nanguaq" ko Nanguaq, Payleday Records... O Romadiway O Radiw (Songs/Raradiw) O Albums (Taradiwan) O Singles (Radiw) O Awards ato Accolades O References O Links StreetVoice Spotify O Channel no Collage O Facebook Page no Collage O Instagram no Natsuko Lariyod O Instagram no Ông Ka-koân
S.PHON: o~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə ħananaj i, o~u tato~usaaj a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj a ʦəfaŋ i tajwan, nani **** a miħəʦaan * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a misatapaŋ. ira sa ʦi natso~u~uko~u ɾarijo~uɬ~ɮ aʦi *ŋ ka-ko~u*n itira i ʦo~uɾɾa*ə. o~u niħaratəŋan no~u ŋaŋan no~umira i, nani ʦəʦajaj a nakamajan o~u "ʦo~uɾɾa*ə" ħananaj ko~u ŋaŋan no~umira i so~uwaɾ no~u fran*aisə. o~u kasatəkəɬ~ɮ no~umira i, ira ko~u masamaamaanaj a ɾaɾəko~u no~u raɬ~ɮiw no~umira. o~u ro~uma sato~u i, miaɾa ko~umira to~u kasasiro~umaro~umaaj a so~uwaɾ a misaŋaʡ to~u raɬ~ɮiw, ira ko~u sano~uħo~uɾam, sano~utajwan, sano~uamirika, sano~uripo~un, sano~uamis/paŋʦaħ, ato~u ro~umaro~uma, misaɾo~umaʡ to~u faəɾo~uħaj to~u nanitirəŋaj a niħaratəŋan no~umira. namaɾaħəʦi ko~umira to~u kao~uɾaħan no~u saka** a faəɾo~uħaj no~u əkimaj a raɬ~ɮiwaj , napasaso~uwaɾ ʦi natso~u~uko~u a maɾa to~u kao~uɾaħan, "nanaj o~u sakapafəɾiən no~u raɬ~ɮiw no~umira to~u saʡiʦəɾ ko~u kasasiro~umaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, so~uwaɾ, *ənɬ~ɮər, ato~u raɬ~ɮiw" so~uwaɾ sa ʦi natso~u~uko~u. o~u nikaħaratəŋ no~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə a misaraɬ~ɮiw i, pakarakarakat no~u tirəŋ a saso~uwaɾ to~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u ro~umaro~uma a naɾimawan, nikao~urira i, ʦaajaj piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u kamo~u to~u niħaratəŋ no~u səra no~u tajwan, nanaj ira ħo~u ko~u ŋaɾaʡ a pasaʦəfaŋ to~u imi no~u raraɬ~ɮiwan. o~u "ħaɾiʦo~uɾɾa*ə" ħananaj ko~u ʦimiɾ no~u mao~uɾaħaj no~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə. o~u ħisto~uri (ko~uŋko~u) i **** a miħəʦaan, namiɬ~ɮəmak ʦiira to~u "səikai sakaʦəʦaj - maʡo~urip to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a sħikən" no~u b~b~vanɬ~ɮ no~u ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u ato~u tħə b~b~vəɾɾ. i **** a miħəʦaan, o~u ŋaŋan no~u tato~usa a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj ʦi "ʦo~uɾɾa*ə" ʦiira a misatapaŋ i so~uni no~u ɾaɾan (strəətb~vo~uiʦə) ato~u ɾaɾan no~u simaɾ (jo~uo~u~uto~u~ub~b~və) i **** a miħəʦaan, saka* a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u saka** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, misatapaŋ a misaŋaʡ to~u raɬ~ɮiw i "n* partj - o~u raraɬ~ɮiw no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u naŋo~u~ua*" ko~u naŋo~u~ua*, pajɾəɬ~ɮaj rəʦo~urɬ~ɮs... o~u ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj o~u raɬ~ɮiw (so~uŋs/raraɬ~ɮiw) o~u aɾb~b~vo~u~ums (taraɬ~ɮiwan) o~u siŋɾəs (raɬ~ɮiw) o~u awarɬ~ɮs ato~u aʦʦo~uɾaɬ~ɮəs o~u rəfərənʦəs o~u ɾinks strəətb~vo~uiʦə spo~utifj o~u ʦħannəɾ no~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə o~u faʦəb~b~vo~uo~uk pa*ə no~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə o~u insta*ram no~u natso~u~uko~u ɾarijo~uɬ~ɮ o~u insta*ram no~u *ŋ ka-ko~u*n
